title: LEGO Technic Ford Bronco SUV Off Road Car Toy - Model Kit with Opening Doors, V6 Engine, Suspension & Steering - Collectible Gift for 9+ Year Old Boys - 42213
features: Ford Bronco model car kit – Inspire kids to create their own off-road stories with this LEGO Technic Ford Bronco SUV building toy for 9+ year old boys and girls
A building toy packed with functions – With this collectible model car kit, kids can have fun assembling the suspension, V6 engine, live rear axle and roof rack with 2 traction boards
Use the spare wheel to steer the car – Boys and girls will enjoy steering the SUV using the spare wheel on the rear of the car toy
Iconic details – This model car building kit features a striking red colour scheme with black detailing, creating a LEGO car to display until it’s time for the next adventure
A car lover gift for kids – This LEGO Technic building set makes a great gift idea for 9+ year old boys and girls or anyone who enjoys exploring and off-road vehicles
A helping hand – Discover intuitive instructions in the LEGO Builder app, where kids can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, track their progress and save sets as they develop new skills
An introduction to engineering – LEGO Technic sets feature realistic movement and mechanisms to introduce young LEGO builders to the universe of engineering
description: From the manufacturer Begin a new journey Inspire off-road adventures Fuel young imaginations with this LEGO Technic Ford Bronco SUV model car building kit for boys and girls ages 9 years and over. Authentic details Inspired by the real-world Ford Bronco SUV With its striking red-and-black detailing, this model car makes a stand-out display piece – until it’s time for the next adventure. Previous page Steer using the spare wheel Easily steer the SUV using the spare wheel on the rear of the car. Front and rear suspension The set features realistic details including suspension with a front axle and a live rear axle. Opening doors and bonnet Have fun exploring details such as the opening doors and bonnet, plus the roof rack with its 2 traction boards. Next page A fun way to build Digital building instructions Give kids an easy and intuitive building adventure with the LEGO Builder app, where they can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track their progress. A car lover gift for kids A gift packed with adventure This STEM building toy makes a great gift idea for boys and girls or anyone who enjoys exploring off-road vehicles. Discover more Explore the world of engineering Introduce young LEGO builders to different engineering concepts and discover more exciting building kits in the LEGO Technic range.
